MFML-4-QC documentation#

API Reference#

MFML Models#

class mfml_qc.mfml.ModelMFML(reg: float = 1e-09, kernel: str = 'matern', sigma: float = 715.0, nu: float = 1.5, p: float = 1.0, q: float = 1.0, p_bar: bool = False, base_estimator: object = None)[source]#

Class to perform model difference MFML.

Kernels#

Data Loaders#

mfml_qc.datasets.load_benzene_data(data_dir: str = None) → Dict[str, Any][source]#

Helper utility to load and parse the built-in Benzene trajectory dataset.

Parameters:

data_dir (str, optional) – Path to the benzene data directory. If None, it dynamically resolves relative to this installed package’s directory.

Returns:

A dictionary containing:

  • ’X_CM’: Flattened Coulomb matrices (shape: 15000, 36)

  • ’energies’: Raw energies CSV data (columns: Time, ZINDO, LC-DFTB, …)

  • ’timecosts’: Time costs CSV data

  • ’columns’: List of string names for each column in the CSVs

Return type:

dict
